name: sil
description: Skeleton OpenClaw plugin for sil — registers stub tools a developer copies to add real ones.

sil_api_url.description: Override for the sil backend URL. Falls back to the SIL_API_URL env var, then https://sil.4gpts.com. The skeleton's stub tools never call it; it exists to demonstrate the plugin-config override path.

sil_api_url.label: sil backend URL
sil_api_url.help: Override only for staging or self-hosted deployments. Unused by the stub tools.

security.packagingNote: Compiled JavaScript ships under ./dist. The skeleton registers stub tools that return placeholder responses and perform no I/O — no network, no filesystem, no credentials. register() is synchronous and opens nothing.
